title: Add FT-002 integration and e2e verification
verify: E2E covers product card variant summary, product detail option selection, missing required options, impossible combinations, unavailable variant blocking, valid selected variant handoff, and default-SKU product path.
Integration/e2e evidence uses seeded backend data and the Windows-native local runtime, not hardcoded frontend data.
REQ-004 and REQ-005 have executable evidence without claiming durable cart persistence.

verify.summary: Manual T2 verification passed. Windows-native smoke, backend product-detail integration, storefront browser E2E, Memory Bank lint, packet/spec gates, and prior per-task red-verify semantic-pass cover product card variant summary, product detail option selection, missing required options, impossible combinations, unavailable variant blocking, valid selected variant handoff, default-SKU product path, seeded PostgreSQL-backed data, and REQ-004/REQ-005 without durable cart persistence, cart merge, checkout, order, payment, production data, or live providers.

evidence_required: Backend product detail integration test output.
Storefront product detail e2e output, trace, screenshot, or video artifact links.
constraints: Use local seeded/test product and variant data.
Do not use live providers, production secrets, or production data.
Do not verify FT-002 by bypassing the storefront/backend boundary or by claiming FT-003 cart persistence.
invariants: No production secrets, production data, or live payment mutation may be used as proof.
Memory Bank must be synchronized after meaningful changes.
Do not create inventory reservation, order, payment, or durable cart state in FT-002.
purpose: Provide executable acceptance evidence for FT-002 as a feature.
success_outcome: FT-002 product detail, variant selection, unavailable/default SKU cases, and selected variant handoff are verified through local integration/e2e evidence.
anti_goals: Do not mark FT-002 complete from unit tests alone.
Do not use production data or live providers.
Do not implement FT-003 durable cart persistence or cart merge.

forbidden_scope: durable cart persistence or cart merge
stop_conditions: Windows-native local runtime is not available from FT-011.
Tests cannot prove variant behavior through seeded backend data.
E2E coverage requires scope outside FT-002 acceptance criteria.
